response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP frameworks, and full-stack development, including recent work at re:cinq. While his background leans heavily toward TypeScript and Node.js rather than Python, his expertise in agentic workflows, cloud-native tools, and technical leadership aligns closely with the role. His open-source contributions and engineering workshops further validate his technical depth and ability to mentor teams.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong full-stack development skills in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud technologies (AWS CDK)
Proven leadership in technical workshops and open-source project development
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Python experience, a core requirement for the role
No direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in listed roles
Short tenure in current role (6 months) may raise questions about long-term commitment
